retrieved_result: Bar Furniture Buying Guide Bar Furniture Buying Guide You may love to invite friends for martinis, or you may be having over the guys for the big game. You might need kitchen stools, so you can use a counter as a breakfast bar. Or you may be adding a dining area to a part of your house you didn't think was going to be usable
